name: Sleep Quality Enhancement
description: Transform your sleep patterns with this 21-day program that combines sleep hygiene education, relaxation techniques, and personalized sleep tracking to help you achieve restful, restorative sleep.

steps.title: Sleep Environment Assessment
steps.description: Evaluate and optimize your bedroom for better sleep
steps.content: Check lighting, temperature, noise levels, and mattress comfort

steps.title: Circadian Rhythm Alignment
steps.description: Establish consistent sleep and wake times
steps.content: Set a regular sleep schedule and morning light exposure routine
